# programming

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/programming`

Package programming is GOLC's attribute programmer (PROG-02/PROG-03):
ProgrammerState is the in-memory scratch buffer of every semantic
intensity, color, position, or beam value a show author has touched
since the last Clear, always normalized to [0,1] against
fixture.Capability.Range rather than a second, parallel bounds concept.
The rest of the package builds on that buffer: theme, chase, preset, and
motion authoring a show author records once and reuses across scenes
over a fixture pool.
